    C

    CAN - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture.FurnitureTypes
     
    CANDY - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture.FurnitureTypes
     
    changeProfile(int) - Method in class model.Game
    Switch the current profile
    changeStatus(int, float) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.entities.Lift
    Allows to give the command to go up or down
    check(boolean) - Method in class model.entity.Player
     
    CHECK - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.Player.PlayerActions
     
    checkCurrentPercent() - Method in class model.entity.detectable.InteractableManager
    Checks the current percent if the current interactable is a furniture
    checkFloor(Rectangle2D.Float, float, int[][], boolean) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Checks if there's still floor on the way (used for the grounded mobile entity)
    checkInteractable(Play) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.InteractableManager
    Player interaction to the interactable
    commandLift(int, Player) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.LiftManager
    Given a command, applies on all the lifts of the same x
    compareTo(RecordSave) - Method in class model.RecordSave
     
    COMPUTER - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture.FurnitureTypes
     
    CONTROL_ROOM - Enum constant in enum class model.util.EntityFactory.EntityTypes
     
    controller - package controller
     
    Controller - Class in controller
    Controller used to set the game model, the window view and all the controls and commands for the game while also starting the game loop and manage the timers
    Controller(Game, Window) - Constructor for class controller.Controller
    From the constructor, other than getting the model and the view, I add some additional ActionListeners in some panels, add Observer for the Observable, the Timer of the game and KeyListeners
    ControlRoom - Class in model.entity.detectable.entities
    ControlRoom is basically an Interactable that represents an entrance that the Player need have a full pass to get access into and winning the game.
    ControlRoom(float, float) - Constructor for class model.entity.detectable.entities.ControlRoom
    ControlRoom constructor (The entity used as finish line) that sets the hitbox and dtcbox
    createButton(String, int, int) - Static method in class view.util.FactoryComponents
    Creation of a interactive button
    createEntity(int, int, int, int) - Static method in class model.util.EntityFactory
    Gets 4 integers that acts like important datas for the creation of the Entity
    createLabel(String, int, Color) - Static method in class view.util.FactoryComponents
    Creation of a JLabel having as input title (Text of the Label), size and color.
    createLabel(String, int, Color, int) - Static method in class view.util.FactoryComponents
    Creation of a JLabel having as input title (Text of the Label), size, color and an additional horizontal alignment.
    currentInElevator() - Method in class model.level.LevelManager
    Checks if the current level is a Elevator
    currentInRoom() - Method in class model.level.LevelManager
    Checks if the current level is a Room
